name: Chicken and Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Broiler-fryer chicken, cut into serving pieces
3 medium Carrots, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash chicken and pat dry.
2. Place chicken, the 2 cups water, peppercorns, bay leaves, and salt in a deep, 2 1/2 to 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 10 minutes. Stir. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven an additional 5 minutes.
3. Add carrot slices and heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes longer.
4. Remove chicken pieces from broth and set chicken aside until cool enough to handle. Reserve broth. Discard bones, bay leaves, and peppercorns. Skim any excess fat from chicken broth.
5. Return chicken to casserole.
6. In a small bowl combine flour, the 3/4 cup cold water, and sage until smooth. Gradually stir flour mixture into chicken mixture.
7. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until gravy is thickened and smooth. Stir occasionally.
8. Prepare dumpling dough in a small bowl by combining biscuit mix, milk, and parsley flakes; stir with a fork until just blended.
9. Add mushrooms and peas to chicken and gravy mixture.
10. Drop dumpling dough by spoonfuls onto hot chicken mixture and heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes.
11. Uncover casserole and heat an additional 2 to 4 minutes or until dumplings are no longer doughy on the underside.
